arts.ttl: Victor Orta wants to offer transfer escape for star man Leeds United sold in the summer
arts.sum: Leeds United were forced into the sale of Archie Gray to Tottenham in the summer window for £40million, but the teenager has found Premier League football hard to come by. Interestingly, a report from Mucho Deporte is now claiming that former Leeds sporting director Victor Orta is looking to bring Gray to his current club Sevilla.

arts.ttl: Farke claimed Leeds would’ve got promoted if 31-year-old wasn’t injured in 2023/24
arts.sum: Leeds United missed out on promotion to the Premier League by a whisker last season, and Daniel Farke has suggested Patrick Bamford’s omission was one cause. The striker, who is apparently growing frustrated with his lack of minutes, is considering leaving the club where he has spent the past six years. arts.ttl: Tom Cleverley launches brutal criticism of Watford squad ahead of Leeds United clash
arts.sum: Hornets boss Cleverley has identified the problem his Watford side face at the moment, and it’s nothing to do with how he’s preparing the team, he thinks it’s down to the players being inconsistent on the basis (via the Watford Observer ): Leeds United host Watford this evening looking to secure back-to-back wins and climb into the automatic promotion places in the process.

arts.ttl: Former Leeds United chief Victor Orta is ‘already asking about’ Archie Gray transfer deal
arts.sum: On his decision to join Spurs, Gray said: “It’s a huge club and my dad said that too . Former Leeds United director of football Victor Orta is lining up an audacious January loan move for Archie Gray.

arts.ttl: Leeds have 3 players facing possible yellow card ban
arts.sum: Leeds United could be looking at suspensions very soon for three out of their starting back four, as they stand on four yellow cards and one away from a ban. The concentration of Leeds’ yellow cards is the concern here, because the three players sitting one caution away from a one-match ban are all in the back four.

arts.ttl: ‘He has to wait’ – Daniel Farke delivers verdict as Leeds United ‘legend’ struggles for minutes
arts.sum: Leeds United boss Daniel Farke has no concerns over the mentality of ‘legend’ Patrick Bamford, but he must… The post ‘He has to wait’ – Daniel Farke delivers verdict as Leeds United ‘legend’ struggles for minutes appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Supercomputer predicts Leeds United's final Championship position after fresh title twist
arts.sum: Both the Clarets and the Whites will secure promotion to the Premier League, according to the CSDB.gg Championship SuperComputer. Scott Parker's outfit, who are the only side to have beaten United this term, leapfrogged the Whites into second position after recording a 2-0 win at Sheffield Wednesday on Saturday.

arts.ttl: 34-year-old French international set to plug massive hole at Leeds United
arts.sum: Daniel Farke will have accepted he’d be under pressure at Leeds this season after not guiding the all whites to promotion at the first time of asking in 2023/24, so it appears that he’s planning to sign Josuha Guilavogui to help with their promotion push from here on in. A brilliant 2-0 win over Sheffield […] The post 34-year-old French international set to plug massive hole at Leeds United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Leeds would be a PL club if Bamford played more - Farke
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke believes that the club would have been promoted last season if Patrick Bamford has stayed fit for longer. It comes having not started a league game so far this season, nursing injuries and struggling to get back to full fitness – as both Joseph and Piroe impress in their current roles.
